emails.subject: Congratulations
emails.body: Anthony, Congratulations. Well deserved. I am very happy for you. Better late than never. Vince

emails.subject: Re: Congratulations
emails.body: Re: Congratulations Vince, Congratulations to you too! In my mind you've always been an MD, they're just officializing it now. Thank you very for all your help and support. --anthony Vince J Kaminski 01/11/2000 10:05 AM
